rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s core analysis: both focus on promotion-lift decomposition (e.g., switching/stockpiling) and on net outcomes beyond gross lift, while the citing note explicitly evaluates retailer/manufacturer gross lift, net volume, and net revenue using mechanism decomposition. Given this strong conceptual and methodological overlap, the citation is plausibly foundational/method-related rather than a casual background mention. The pair is also supported by an exact DOI match in the reference evidence.
